name: Pecan Delights
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine brown sugar, butter, corn syrup, and salt.
2. Cook over medium heat until all sugar is dissolved.
3. Gradually add the sweetened condensed milk and mix well.
4. Continue cooking until a candy thermometer reads 248°F (firm ball stage).
5. Remove from the heat; stir in vanilla extract until blended.
6. Fold in the pecans.
7. Drop by tablespoonfuls onto a wax paper-lined cookie sheet.
8. Chill until firm.
9. Melt chocolate chips and shortening in a microwave-safe bowl or double boiler.
10. Drizzle over each cluster.
